title: Jappa V1 Glass
description: Brings back the glass texture from Jappa’s first iteration of textures with connected textures.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Jappa V1 Glass** brings back glass textures from the first iteration of the new textures by Jappa.

![Optional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a868b69f3fcafea77190464ed6cba5ded63d8581_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Connected Textures</summary>
  
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c42666b76679c595bb2becf5882c3660642f49b0.gif)
This pack includes connected textures!

</details>
